description_long: This is a large, commercial jet airliner with a distinctive gold and gray livery, featuring four underwing engines and a wide-body fuselage. The wings are swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, with prominent engine nacelles visible beneath each wing. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and a conventional horizontal stabilizer, both in matching gold. The fuselage displays detailed windows and doors, as well as branding and logo graphics along the side. The landing gear is not visible in the images, suggesting it may be retracted. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage, with a multi-windowed, enclosed design typical of large passenger aircraft.
description: A large, gold and gray commercial jet airliner with four underwing engines, swept low-mounted wings, and a forward cockpit. The fuselage features detailed windows, doors, and branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, rounded nose, forward cockpit windows, and the full span of the swept wings with four visible engines.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the gold fuselage, detailed windows, doors, branding, and the underwing engines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section with a single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the gold livery, windows, doors, branding, and underwing engines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with no visible winglets and a slight dihedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible, inferred from typical configuration).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows.
